## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're facing. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen, including any API, CLI, or configuration changes.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
